headline: Messi feels physically good, not focused on age
body: Leo Messi stated he feels physically good and does not consider his age when playing.
text:
🚨🇦🇷 Leo Messi: “I honestly don’t play thinking about how old I am but rather about how I feel physically”.

“From there, I just try to give my maximum, regardless of my age, and give everything I have. The truth is that I feel physically good”.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Messi feels physically good, not focused on age
